_meta.description: Stock domain hypothesis registry v2 — second-generation signals with richer feature sets (P3-08). All hypotheses require GBGF G01-G10 validation and human review before any production consideration.
_meta.v1_outcome: H001-H003 all REJECTED on real data (BH-FDR pass: 0/30). No edge found with simple momentum/RSI/volume signals.
guardrails: All validation requires GBGF G01-G10 gates
Human review required before any promotion past T2
Production write is blocked by G09/G10
BH-FDR correction applied globally across all tests

hypotheses.description: Momentum + Volume Confirmation: buy when 20d return > 0 AND volume z-score > 1 (above average volume supports the move). Avoids pure price momentum by requiring institutional-grade volume confirmation.
hypotheses.expected_signal: 20d momentum with above-average volume (z>1) predicts positive next-5d return; volume filters out weak momentum signals
hypotheses.risk_note: Volume z-score can spike on bad news (sell-off). Signal may be contaminated by down-volume days if directional filter is weak.

hypotheses.description: Pullback in Uptrend: buy when close > MA60 (long-term uptrend) AND 5d return < 0 (short-term pullback) AND 20d return > 0 (medium-term trend intact). Tests whether dip-buying in confirmed uptrends has positive expectancy.
hypotheses.expected_signal: Short-term pullback within a longer uptrend reverts positively over next 5d
hypotheses.entry_rule: close > ma60 AND return_5d < 0 AND return_20d > 0
hypotheses.risk_note: Trend filters (MA60) lag by definition. In sustained downtrends the signal fires late. Close > MA60 is a lagging not predictive condition.

hypotheses.description: Low Volatility Breakout: buy when 20d realized volatility is in the bottom 25th percentile of its historical distribution AND close breaks above the 20d high. Tests volatility contraction-then-expansion (squeeze breakout) pattern.
hypotheses.expected_signal: Breakout after volatility squeeze (low vol followed by new high) predicts sustained directional move
hypotheses.risk_note: Percentile is computed rolling (PIT-safe) but requires sufficient history. Signal fires rarely, limiting sample size. False breakouts in choppy markets.

hypotheses.description: Relative Strength vs Universe: buy when the symbol's 20d return exceeds the median 20d return of all symbols in the validation universe. Tests whether relative outperformance persists over the next 5 trading days.
hypotheses.expected_signal: Symbols outperforming the universe median continue to outperform over next 5d (momentum relative to peers)
hypotheses.risk_note: Universe median is computed only from symbols present in the current batch (not the full market). Survivorship bias in symbol selection. Universe composition affects signal.

hypotheses.description: ETF Defensive Momentum: buy ETF when 20d return > 0 (positive trend) AND 20d max drawdown > -5% (low drawdown / defensive). Tests whether low-drawdown uptrending ETFs outperform over next 5d. ETF-only to test systematic, diversified instruments.
hypotheses.expected_signal: ETFs with positive momentum and low drawdown continue upward over next 5d (defensive momentum in diversified instruments)
hypotheses.risk_note: ETF universe is small (Taiwan: ~20-50 ETFs with sufficient history). Low drawdown filter may only fire in bull markets, creating survivorship-like selection.
